title: Music platforms are converging on guided discovery, but control remains fragmented.
objective: Show that the category is moving from passive personalization toward prompts, feeds, and controls while identifying the remaining product gap.

layout.top: One market signal with source attribution

content.market_signal: Spotify reports nearly 2 billion music discoveries every 24 hours; discovery is a core engagement surface, not a niche workflow. This is a company-reported activity metric, not independent market sizing.

competitors.current_discovery_pattern: Discover Weekly, daylist, DJ requests, genre controls, and Prompted Playlist beta
competitors.strength: Deep listening history plus increasingly explicit natural-language input
competitors.remaining_gap_to_test: Whether intent, novelty, exclusions, and feedback form one understandable closed loop

competitors.current_discovery_pattern: Personalized Home suggestions, Discovery Station, editorial and genre exploration
competitors.strength: Large catalog and integrated editorial/personalized surfaces
competitors.remaining_gap_to_test: Direct, session-level expression and visible correction of the next set

competitors.current_discovery_pattern: Samples short-form discovery feed plus personalized mixes
competitors.strength: Fast low-commitment sampling with immediate save/deeper-view actions
competitors.remaining_gap_to_test: Explicit novelty boundaries and protection from persistent-profile contamination

competitors.current_discovery_pattern: Daily Discovery provides 10 personalized tracks refreshed daily
competitors.remaining_gap_to_test: Intent capture and steering before waiting for the next refresh

content.opportunity: The whitespace is not ‘AI playlists.’ It is a transparent session contract: tell the system what fits now, edit its interpretation, control how far to explore, and see feedback change the next result.
content.market_research_limit: This slide compares product mechanics. It intentionally avoids unsupported TAM, share, or adoption estimates.

visuals.alt: Competitor matrix comparing passive personalization, explicit intent, novelty control, exclusions, and immediate steering.

speaker_notes: Do not position a natural-language prompt alone as differentiation; Spotify already offers prompt-led discovery in selected markets.
Our testable differentiation is the closed loop and the ability to isolate which mechanism creates value.
Competitor facts are current as of 2 July 2026 and should be rechecked before final PDF creation.
